game_name: The Mafat Conspiracy: Golgo 13 Part II

special_mechanics.name: Jumping and Running
special_mechanics.description: Golgo 13 performs running and jumping actions throughout scrolling platformer levels

special_mechanics.name: Melee Combat
special_mechanics.description: Player can punch and kick enemies in stationary combat screens

special_mechanics.name: Firearm Combat
special_mechanics.description: Player uses guns with ammo pickups in horizontally scrolling stages; armed with pistol, can fire at enemies

special_mechanics.name: Grenade Throwing
special_mechanics.description: Player can throw hand grenades during Ferrari sequences and combat

tier_notes: Tier 2: Empirical/qualitative data only. Wikipedia article describes gameplay mechanics and level types (horizontally scrolling, stationary, 3D Ferrari, maze, sniper screens) but contains no quantitative physics parameters. No technical documentation available regarding movement speeds, gravity values, jump mechanics, or sub-pixel systems.
